<style>

  /* ---- Console THEME tokens: the full 16-theme colour-scheme set, ported 1:1
       from src/.../variants/T/console4.css --v2-* roles and mapped onto this
       study's token names. The picker sets html[data-theme]; each block fully
       restyles the page. --zicato-accent ← --v2-accent. Default: monokai. ---- */
  html[data-theme="monokai"] {
    --paper:#1e1f1c; --panel:#272822; --panel-2:#23241f;
    --ink:#f8f8f2; --ink-soft:#c9cabf; --ink-faint:#8f908a;
    --rule:#3a3b34; --rule-soft:#2f302a;
    --good:#a6e22e; --good-soft:#2c361a; --bad:#f92672; --caution:#e6db74;
    --accent:#66d9ef; --accent-2:#66d9ef; --zicato-accent:#66d9ef;
  }
  html[data-theme="solarized-dark"] {
    --paper:#04222B; --panel:#0A2D38; --panel-2:#0A2730;
    --ink:#93A1A1; --ink-soft:#839496; --ink-faint:#5E7079;
    --rule:#0E3540; --rule-soft:#0B2E39;
    --good:#8BB80E; --good-soft:#1C3320; --bad:#E0483C; --caution:#C4920A;
    --accent:#2AA198; --accent-2:#2AA198; --zicato-accent:#2AA198;
  }
  html[data-theme="solarized-light"] {
    --paper:#FDF6E3; --panel:#FBF1D6; --panel-2:#F2E9CE;
    --ink:#586E75; --ink-soft:#657B83; --ink-faint:#93A1A1;
    --rule:#E7DCBE; --rule-soft:#F0E7CC;
    --good:#6B9B0B; --good-soft:#E3ECCB; --bad:#DC322F; --caution:#B58900;
    --accent:#268BD2; --accent-2:#268BD2; --zicato-accent:#268BD2;
  }
  html[data-theme="google-light"] {
    --paper:#FFFFFF; --panel:#F4F4F4; --panel-2:#F8F8F8;
    --ink:#474A4E; --ink-soft:#5F6368; --ink-faint:#9FA1A4;
    --rule:#E2E3E4; --rule-soft:#F1F1F1;
    --good:#34A853; --good-soft:#D2ECD9; --bad:#EA4335; --caution:#C99700;
    --accent:#1B9CB8; --accent-2:#1B9CB8; --zicato-accent:#1B9CB8;
  }
  html[data-theme="google-dark"] {
    --paper:#202124; --panel:#2C2D30; --panel-2:#28292C;
    --ink:#FFFFFF; --ink-soft:#E8EAED; --ink-faint:#989A9D;
    --rule:#444548; --rule-soft:#323336;
    --good:#34A853; --good-soft:#243F2E; --bad:#EA4335; --caution:#FBBC05;
    --accent:#24C1E0; --accent-2:#24C1E0; --zicato-accent:#24C1E0;
  }
  html[data-theme="lunaria-light"] {
    --paper:#EBE4E1; --panel:#E2DCD9; --panel-2:#E6DFDC;
    --ink:#363434; --ink-soft:#484646; --ink-faint:#898584;
    --rule:#CEC8C5; --rule-soft:#DCD6D3;
    --good:#497D46; --good-soft:#C7CDBF; --bad:#783C1F; --caution:#8F750B;
    --accent:#3778A9; --accent-2:#3778A9; --zicato-accent:#3778A9;
  }
  html[data-theme="lunaria-eclipse"] {
    --paper:#323F46; --panel:#3B484F; --panel-2:#38454C;
    --ink:#DFE2ED; --ink-soft:#C9CDD7; --ink-faint:#8D949D;
    --rule:#4D5960; --rule-soft:#404C53;
    --good:#BEDBC1; --good-soft:#516161; --bad:#BA9088; --caution:#F1DFB4;
    --accent:#C8429F; --accent-2:#C8429F; --zicato-accent:#C8429F;
  }
  html[data-theme="belafonte-day"] {
    --paper:#D5CCBA; --panel:#CCC3B2; --panel-2:#D0C6B5;
    --ink:#34292D; --ink-soft:#45373C; --ink-faint:#7F736E;
    --rule:#BBB1A3; --rule-soft:#C8BFAF;
    --good:#6E6A4E; --good-soft:#C3BCA7; --bad:#BE100E; --caution:#B57A1E;
    --accent:#426A79; --accent-2:#426A79; --zicato-accent:#426A79;
  }
  html[data-theme="belafonte-night"] {
    --paper:#20111B; --panel:#271821; --panel-2:#25161F;
    --ink:#D5CCBA; --ink-soft:#968C83; --ink-faint:#675B59;
    --rule:#35272E; --rule-soft:#2B1C24;
    --good:#A6A07A; --good-soft:#362A2B; --bad:#D6403E; --caution:#EAA549;
    --accent:#6F8E97; --accent-2:#6F8E97; --zicato-accent:#6F8E97;
  }
  html[data-theme="paper"] {
    --paper:#F2EEDE; --panel:#E6E2D3; --panel-2:#E8E4D5;
    --ink:#1A1A1A; --ink-soft:#33312B; --ink-faint:#85837A;
    --rule:#C6C3B6; --rule-soft:#DCD9CA;
    --good:#216609; --good-soft:#CCD6B8; --bad:#CC3E28; --caution:#B58900;
    --accent:#1E6FCC; --accent-2:#1E6FCC; --zicato-accent:#1E6FCC;
  }
  html[data-theme="zenburn"] {
    --paper:#3A3A3A; --panel:#424241; --panel-2:#404040;
    --ink:#DCDCCC; --ink-soft:#C5C5B8; --ink-faint:#83837C;
    --rule:#575754; --rule-soft:#494947;
    --good:#8FB28F; --good-soft:#2E3A2E; --bad:#CC9393; --caution:#FFD7A7;
    --accent:#8CD0D3; --accent-2:#8CD0D3; --zicato-accent:#8CD0D3;
  }
  html[data-theme="selenized-black"] {
    --paper:#181818; --panel:#202020; --panel-2:#1E1E1E;
    --ink:#DEDEDE; --ink-soft:#B9B9B9; --ink-faint:#606060;
    --rule:#353535; --rule-soft:#262626;
    --good:#83C746; --good-soft:#243218; --bad:#FF5E56; --caution:#EFC541;
    --accent:#56D8C9; --accent-2:#56D8C9; --zicato-accent:#56D8C9;
  }
  html[data-theme="relaxed"] {
    --paper:#353A44; --panel:#3D424B; --panel-2:#3C404A;
    --ink:#F7F7F7; --ink-soft:#D9D9D9; --ink-faint:#7F8287;
    --rule:#53575F; --rule-soft:#444851;
    --good:#A0AC77; --good-soft:#353D2E; --bad:#BC5653; --caution:#EBC17A;
    --accent:#7EAAC7; --accent-2:#7EAAC7; --zicato-accent:#7EAAC7;
  }
  html[data-theme="espresso"] {
    --paper:#323232; --panel:#3A3A3A; --panel-2:#383838;
    --ink:#FFFFFF; --ink-soft:#D9D9D9; --ink-faint:#8A8A8A;
    --rule:#4C4C4C; --rule-soft:#3E3E3E;
    --good:#A5C261; --good-soft:#353D24; --bad:#D25252; --caution:#FFC66D;
    --accent:#6C99BB; --accent-2:#6C99BB; --zicato-accent:#6C99BB;
  }
  html[data-theme="dracula"] {
    --paper:#282A36; --panel:#343746; --panel-2:#2E303D;
    --ink:#F8F8F2; --ink-soft:#D4D4CF; --ink-faint:#6272A4;
    --rule:#44475A; --rule-soft:#353848;
    --good:#50FA7B; --good-soft:#213A2A; --bad:#FF5555; --caution:#F1FA8C;
    --accent:#BD93F9; --accent-2:#BD93F9; --zicato-accent:#BD93F9;
  }
  html[data-theme="ubuntu"] {
    --paper:#300A24; --panel:#3D1530; --panel-2:#371129;
    --ink:#EEEEEC; --ink-soft:#CBC3C9; --ink-faint:#8A7383;
    --rule:#4B2640; --rule-soft:#3E1A32;
    --good:#8AE234; --good-soft:#2E3320; --bad:#CC0000; --caution:#FCE94F;
    --accent:#34E2E2; --accent-2:#34E2E2; --zicato-accent:#34E2E2;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; }
  html, body { margin: 0; }
  body {
    background: var(--paper);
    color: var(--ink);
    font-family: ui-monospace, "JetBrains Mono", SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    transition: background .18s, color .18s;
    padding: 0 0 80px;
  }

  header {
    position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
    padding: 14px 24px;
    background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--paper) 88%, transparent);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  header h1 { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0; letter-spacing: .02em; }
  header .crumb { font-size: 11px; color: var(--ink-faint); }
  header .crumb a { color: var(--ink-faint); text-decoration: none; }
  header .crumb a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
  header .spacer { flex: 1; }

  main { max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
  section { margin: 34px 0; }
  h2 {
    font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .12em;
    color: var(--ink-faint); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    padding-bottom: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .lede { color: var(--ink-soft); font-size: 13px; margin: 4px 0 20px; max-width: 88ch; }
  .lede code { background: var(--panel); padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; }
  .mono { font-family: inherit; }
  .good { color: var(--good); }
  .bad  { color: var(--bad); }
  .faint{ color: var(--ink-faint); }
  .acc  { color: var(--accent); }

  /* sample fact strip */
  .sample {
    border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--panel);
    padding: 16px 20px; margin: 0 0 12px;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px,1fr)); gap: 14px 24px;
  }
  .sample .kv { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
  .sample .kv .k { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faint); }
  .sample .kv .v { font-size: 15px; color: var(--ink); }
  .sample .kv .v b { font-weight: 700; }

  /* option card */
  .opt {
    border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--panel);
    padding: 0; margin-bottom: 22px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .opt > .opt-head {
    display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); background: var(--panel-2);
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .opt-head .num {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .1em; color: var(--paper);
    background: var(--accent); border-radius: 5px; padding: 3px 9px;
  }
  .opt-head .name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); }
  .opt-head .tech { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ink-faint); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 999px; padding: 2px 8px; }
  .opt-head .why { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-soft); flex: 1 1 100%; margin-top: 2px; }
  .opt-body { padding: 20px; }
  figure { margin: 0; width: 100%; }
  figure svg { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; }
  .fig-narrow { max-width: 620px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .fig-mid { max-width: 820px; }

  .reveal {
    margin-top: 14px; font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--ink-soft);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule); padding: 7px 12px;
    background: var(--panel-2); border-radius: 6px;
  }
  .reveal b { color: var(--ink); }

  /* small inline legend under figures */
  .leg { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--ink-faint); margin-top: 12px; }
  .leg span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
  .leg i { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 2px; display: inline-block; border: 1px solid transparent; }
  .leg i.g { background: var(--good); } .leg i.r { background: var(--bad); }
  .leg i.a { background: var(--accent); } .leg i.f { background: var(--ink-faint); }
  .leg i.dash { background: transparent; border: 1px dashed var(--ink-faint); }
  .leg i.cache { background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--caution); }
  .leg i.c { background: transparent; border: 1px dashed var(--caution); }

  /* ---- isoscore hovercard: a theme-aware, keyboard-reachable explainer popover ---- */
  .hc-fig { position: relative; }
  .hc { position: absolute; z-index: 4; font-family: ui-monospace, "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
        font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent); cursor: help;
        border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--accent); white-space: nowrap; }
  .hc.hc-big { font-size: 19px; font-weight: 700; border-bottom-width: 0; }
  .hc:focus { outline: none; }
  .hc:focus-visible { outline: 1px dashed var(--accent); outline-offset: 3px; }
  .hc .hc-i { display: inline-block; width: 13px; height: 13px; line-height: 12px; text-align: center;
              border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; font-size: 9px; font-style: normal;
              font-weight: 700; vertical-align: 2px; margin-left: 5px; }
  .hc-card { position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 8px); right: 0; width: 366px; max-width: 78vw;
             background: var(--panel); color: var(--ink); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 4px;
             box-shadow: 0 8px 26px rgba(0,0,0,.30); padding: 13px 15px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400;
             white-space: normal; text-align: left; z-index: 30;
             visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-3px); transition: opacity .12s, transform .12s; }
  .hc--up .hc-card { top: auto; bottom: calc(100% + 8px); transform: translateY(3px); }
  .hc:hover .hc-card, .hc:focus-within .hc-card { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .hc-card .hc-h { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; }
  .hc-card .hc-sub { color: var(--ink-faint); font-size: 9.5px; margin: 2px 0 9px; }
  .hc-card p { margin: 0 0 9px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--ink-soft); }
  .hc-card .hc-math { border-top: 1px solid var(--rule-soft); padding-top: 9px; font-size: 10.5px; line-height: 1.85; }
  .hc-card .hc-intro { color: var(--ink-faint); font-size: 9.5px; margin-bottom: 5px; }
  .hc-card .hc-eq { color: var(--ink); }
  .hc-card .hc-eq .hc-note { color: var(--ink-faint); }
  .hc-card .hc-foot { margin-top: 10px; color: var(--accent); font-size: 10px;
                      border-top: 1px solid var(--rule-soft); padding-top: 8px; }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .hc-card { transition: none; } }

  /* ---- "how to read" hovercard: the same explainer popover, anchored in a card header ---- */
  .opt-head .hc-head { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center;
    font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--ink-faint); border-bottom: none; white-space: nowrap; cursor: help; }
  .opt-head .hc-head:hover, .opt-head .hc-head:focus-within { color: var(--accent); }
  .opt-head .hc-head .hc-i { margin-left: 0; width: 14px; height: 14px; line-height: 13px; cursor: help; }
  .opt-head .hc-head:hover .hc-i, .opt-head .hc-head:focus-within .hc-i {
    background: var(--accent); color: var(--paper); }
  .opt-head .hc-head .hc-card { top: calc(100% + 8px); left: 0; right: auto;
    text-transform: none; letter-spacing: normal; font-weight: 400; }
  .hc-card .hc-look { color: var(--ink); }
  .hc-card .hc-bad { color: var(--bad); } .hc-card .hc-good { color: var(--good); }

  svg text { font-family: ui-monospace, "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; }

  footer { max-width: 1180px; margin: 40px auto 0; padding: 18px 24px; color: var(--ink-faint); font-size: 11px; border-top: 1px solid var(--rule); }


  /* ---- the COLOUR SWATCH DROPDOWN (16 Console themes) — mirrors .dt-cd ---- */
  .theme-pick-label { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faint); }
  .dt-cd { position: relative; display: inline-flex; }
  .dt-cd-trigger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px 9px;
    background: var(--panel); color: var(--ink-soft); cursor: pointer;
    font: inherit; font-size: 11px; transition: border-color .15s, color .15s; }
  .dt-cd-trigger:hover { color: var(--ink); border-color: var(--accent); }
  .dt-cd-trigger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }
  .dt-cd-name { color: var(--ink); white-space: nowrap; }
  .dt-cd-caret { color: var(--ink-faint); font-size: 8px; transition: transform .15s; }
  .dt-cd.dt-cd-open .dt-cd-caret { transform: rotate(180deg); }
  .dt-swatch-strip { display: inline-flex; border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--rule); }
  .dt-swatch { display: inline-block; width: 11px; height: 13px; }
  .dt-swatch-strip-sm .dt-swatch { width: 9px; height: 11px; }
  .dt-cd-list { display: none; position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 5px); right: 0; z-index: 60;
    min-width: 200px; max-height: 70vh; overflow-y: auto;
    background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 6px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.28); padding: 4px; }
  .dt-cd.dt-cd-open .dt-cd-list { display: block; }
  .dt-cd-option { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 5px 7px; border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer; color: var(--ink-soft); transition: background .12s, color .12s; }
  .dt-cd-option .dt-cd-name { font-size: 10.5px; }
  .dt-cd-option:hover, .dt-cd-option.dt-cd-active { background: var(--rule-soft); color: var(--ink); }
  .dt-cd-option[aria-selected="true"] .dt-cd-name { color: var(--accent); }

*{box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{height:100%;margin:0}
body{background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink);font-family:ui-monospace,"SF Mono",Menlo,Consolas,monospace;overflow:hidden;transition:background .18s,color .18s;}
.topbar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:44px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;padding:0 24px;z-index:60;}
.topbar .wm{font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.04em;color:var(--ink);font-size:15px;}
.topbar .crumb{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-faint);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;}
.topbar .spacer{flex:1;}
.topbar .count{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.theme-pick-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-faint);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;}
.progress{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;height:3px;background:var(--accent);width:0;z-index:60;transition:width .25s;}
.hint{position:fixed;bottom:11px;right:22px;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--ink-faint);letter-spacing:.06em;z-index:55;}
.stage{position:fixed;transform-origin:0 0;width:1280px;height:800px;background:var(--paper);}
.slide{position:absolute;inset:0;padding:42px 92px 48px;display:none;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;}
.slide.active{display:flex;animation:fin .28s ease both;}
@keyframes fin{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.slide .kick{font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-bottom:12px;}
.slide h2{font-size:42px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.12;margin:0 0 .5em;color:var(--ink);max-width:1090px;}
.slide .accent{color:var(--accent);}
.slide .body{font-size:19px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.6;max-width:1050px;}
.slide .body p{margin:0 0 .7em;} .slide .body b,.slide .body strong{color:var(--ink);}
.slide ul{margin:.3em 0;padding-left:1.1em;} .slide li{margin:.34em 0;}
.slide .lead{font-size:21px;}
figure.dg{margin:8px 0 0;text-align:center;}
figure.dg svg{display:block;max-height:404px;width:auto;max-width:1010px;margin:0 auto;}
figure.dg figcaption{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:9px;max-width:990px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;line-height:1.5;}
.note{border:1px solid var(--rule);background:var(--panel-2);border-radius:8px;padding:11px 15px;margin-top:14px;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55;max-width:1050px;}
.note strong{color:var(--ink);}
.compare{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin:10px 0;max-width:1010px;}
.compare .box{border:1px solid var(--rule);background:var(--panel);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.5;}
.compare .box .t{font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;} .compare .box .t.good{color:var(--good);} .compare .box .t.bad{color:var(--bad);} .compare .box .t.acc{color:var(--accent);}
.eq{font-size:22px;color:var(--ink);margin:.35em 0;}
.num-list{list-style:none;padding:0;counter-reset:n;max-width:1080px;}
.num-list li{counter-increment:n;position:relative;padding-left:2.5em;margin:.5em 0;font-size:17px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.5;}
.num-list li::before{content:counter(n);position:absolute;left:0;top:.05em;font-weight:700;color:var(--paper);background:var(--accent);border-radius:5px;padding:1px 9px;font-size:.82em;}
.num-list li b{color:var(--ink);}
.slide.title{justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;}
.slide .wm{font-size:148px;font-weight:700;line-height:.86;color:var(--ink);letter-spacing:-.02em;}
.slide .tagline{font-size:32px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:.32em;max-width:1010px;line-height:1.2;}
.slide .title-sub{font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:1.25em;max-width:800px;line-height:1.6;}

  /* ---- split layout: text beside a diagram (kills the stacked top-clip) ---- */
  .slide.split{flex-direction:row;align-items:center;gap:48px;padding:38px 74px;}
  .slide.split .col-text{flex:1 1 0;min-width:0;max-width:560px;}
  .slide.split .col-fig{flex:1 1 0;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .slide.split h2{font-size:30px;line-height:1.15;margin:0 0 .5em;}
  .slide.split .body{font-size:16px;line-height:1.55;max-width:none;}
  .slide.split .body p{margin:0 0 .62em;}
  .slide.split .lead{font-size:17px;}
  .slide.split .compare{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:10px;max-width:none;margin:8px 0;}
  .slide.split .compare .box{font-size:13.5px;padding:11px 14px;}
  .slide.split .note{font-size:13px;padding:9px 13px;margin-top:11px;max-width:none;}
  .slide.split .num-list{max-width:none;}
  .slide.split .num-list li{font-size:13.5px;margin:.4em 0;padding-left:2.3em;line-height:1.45;}
  .slide.split .eq{font-size:19px;margin:.2em 0 .55em;}
  .col-fig figure.dg{margin:0;width:100%;}
  .col-fig figure.dg svg{max-height:444px;max-width:100%;margin:0 auto;}
  .col-fig figcaption{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:11px;line-height:1.5;max-width:560px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;text-align:left;}
  /* ---- cv3d vanilla-canvas 3D component (auto-spin, drag-rotate) ---- */
  .cv3d{position:relative;width:100%;max-width:560px;cursor:grab;touch-action:none;margin:0 auto;}
  .cv3d:active{cursor:grabbing;}
  .cv3d-canvas{display:block;width:100%;border:1px solid var(--rule-soft);border-radius:8px;background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--panel) 55%, transparent);}
  .cv3d-tabs{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;justify-content:center;}
  .cv3d-tab{font:inherit;font-size:11px;padding:3px 12px;border:1px solid var(--rule);border-radius:999px;background:var(--panel);color:var(--ink-soft);cursor:pointer;}
  .cv3d-tab.on{background:var(--accent);color:var(--paper);border-color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;}
  .cv3d-tab:hover{color:var(--ink);}
  /* ---- duo layout: a 2D schematic beside its 3D view (same concept, both modalities) ---- */
  .slide.duo{flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;padding:34px 74px;}
  .slide.duo .duo-head{width:100%;max-width:1100px;}
  .slide.duo h2{font-size:29px;line-height:1.14;margin:0 0 .35em;}
  .slide.duo .body{font-size:15px;line-height:1.5;max-width:1100px;}
  .slide.duo .body p{margin:0;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:36px;width:100%;max-width:1100px;align-items:center;margin-top:14px;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs figure.dg{margin:0;width:100%;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs svg{width:100%;height:auto;max-height:344px;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs .cv3d{max-width:100%;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs figcaption{font-size:11.5px;line-height:1.45;text-align:center;margin:9px auto 0;max-width:none;}
  /* ---- method pipeline: one diagram per algorithm step, left to right ---- */
  .slide.method{flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;padding:38px 48px;}
  .slide.method h2{font-size:34px;line-height:1.12;margin:0 0 .15em;}
  .slide.method .pipeline{display:flex;align-items:stretch;justify-content:center;gap:4px;width:100%;max-width:1190px;margin-top:18px;}
  .slide.method .step{flex:1 1 0;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;border:1px solid var(--rule);border-radius:10px;background:var(--panel);padding:9px 10px 11px;}
  .slide.method .step figure.dg{margin:0;width:100%;}
  .slide.method .step figure.dg svg{display:block;width:100%;height:auto;max-height:none;}
  .slide.method .step .cap{margin-top:7px;}
  .slide.method .step .cap .sb{display:inline-block;font-weight:700;color:var(--paper);background:var(--accent);border-radius:5px;padding:0 7px;font-size:11px;margin-right:6px;}
  .slide.method .step .cap b{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink);}
  .slide.method .step .cap p{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin:5px 0 0;line-height:1.42;}
  .slide.method .parrow{display:flex;align-items:center;color:var(--ink-faint);font-size:17px;flex:0 0 auto;}
  /* ---- title slide as split ---- */
  .slide.title.split{align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .slide.title.split .col-text{max-width:600px;}
  .slide.split .wm{font-size:120px;}
  .slide.split .tagline{font-size:27px;margin-top:.3em;}
  .slide.split .title-sub{font-size:14.5px;margin-top:1.05em;max-width:560px;}
  /* research-preview status tag in the topbar — a quiet two-line mark by the
     wordmark; faint, monospace, a hairline divider, no fill/glow/animation. */
  .topbar .respreview{display:inline-flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-self:center;pointer-events:none;user-select:none;font-size:8.5px;line-height:1.2;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--ink-faint);border-left:1px solid var(--rule);padding-left:9px;}
  .topbar .respreview span{display:block;white-space:nowrap;}

.CtxtMenu_InfoClose {  top:.2em; right:.2em;}
.CtxtMenu_InfoContent {  overflow:auto; text-align:left; font-size:80%;  padding:.4em .6em; border:1px inset; margin:1em 0px;  max-height:20em; max-width:30em; background-color:#EEEEEE;  white-space:normal;}
.CtxtMenu_Info.CtxtMenu_MousePost {outline:none;}
.CtxtMenu_Info {  position:fixed; left:50%; width:auto; text-align:center;  border:3px outset; padding:1em 2em; background-color:#DDDDDD;  color:black;  cursor:default; font-family:message-box; font-size:120%;  font-style:normal; text-indent:0; text-transform:none;  line-height:normal; letter-spacing:normal; word-spacing:normal;  word-wrap:normal; white-space:nowrap; float:none; z-index:201;  border-radius: 15px;                     /* Opera 10.5 and IE9 */  -webkit-border-radius:15px;               /* Safari and Chrome */  -moz-border-radius:15px;                  /* Firefox */  -khtml-border-radius:15px;                /* Konqueror */  box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;         /* Opera 10.5 and IE9 */  -webkit-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080; /* Safari 3 & Chrome */  -moz-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;    /* Forefox 3.5 */  -khtml-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;  /* Konqueror */  filter:progid:DXImageTransform.Microsoft.dropshadow(OffX=2, OffY=2, Color="gray", Positive="true"); /* IE */}

.CtxtMenu_MenuClose {  position:absolute;  cursor:pointer;  display:inline-block;  border:2px solid #AAA;  border-radius:18px;  -webkit-border-radius: 18px;             /* Safari and Chrome */  -moz-border-radius: 18px;                /* Firefox */  -khtml-border-radius: 18px;              /* Konqueror */  font-family: "Courier New", Courier;  font-size:24px;  color:#F0F0F0}
.CtxtMenu_MenuClose span {  display:block; background-color:#AAA; border:1.5px solid;  border-radius:18px;  -webkit-border-radius: 18px;             /* Safari and Chrome */  -moz-border-radius: 18px;                /* Firefox */  -khtml-border-radius: 18px;              /* Konqueror */  line-height:0;  padding:8px 0 6px     /* may need to be browser-specific */}
.CtxtMenu_MenuClose:hover {  color:white!important;  border:2px solid #CCC!important}
.CtxtMenu_MenuClose:hover span {  background-color:#CCC!important}
.CtxtMenu_MenuClose:hover:focus {  outline:none}

.CtxtMenu_Menu {  position:absolute;  background-color:white;  color:black;  width:auto; padding:5px 0px;  border:1px solid #CCCCCC; margin:0; cursor:default;  font: menu; text-align:left; text-indent:0; text-transform:none;  line-height:normal; letter-spacing:normal; word-spacing:normal;  word-wrap:normal; white-space:nowrap; float:none; z-index:201;  border-radius: 5px;                     /* Opera 10.5 and IE9 */  -webkit-border-radius: 5px;             /* Safari and Chrome */  -moz-border-radius: 5px;                /* Firefox */  -khtml-border-radius: 5px;              /* Konqueror */  box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;         /* Opera 10.5 and IE9 */  -webkit-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080; /* Safari 3 & Chrome */  -moz-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;    /* Forefox 3.5 */  -khtml-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;  /* Konqueror */}
.CtxtMenu_MenuItem {  padding: 1px 2em;  background:transparent;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuArrow {  position:absolute; right:.5em; padding-top:.25em; color:#666666;  font-family: null; font-size: .75em}
.CtxtMenu_MenuActive .CtxtMenu_MenuArrow {color:white}
.CtxtMenu_MenuArrow.CtxtMenu_RTL {left:.5em; right:auto}
.CtxtMenu_MenuCheck {  position:absolute; left:.7em;  font-family: null}
.CtxtMenu_MenuCheck.CtxtMenu_RTL { right:.7em; left:auto }
.CtxtMenu_MenuRadioCheck {  position:absolute; left: .7em;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuRadioCheck.CtxtMenu_RTL {  right: .7em; left:auto}
.CtxtMenu_MenuInputBox {  padding-left: 1em; right:.5em; color:#666666;  font-family: null;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuInputBox.CtxtMenu_RTL {  left: .1em;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuComboBox {  left:.1em; padding-bottom:.5em;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuSlider {  left: .1em;}
.CtxtMenu_SliderValue {  position:absolute; right:.1em; padding-top:.25em; color:#333333;  font-size: .75em}
.CtxtMenu_SliderBar {  outline: none; background: #d3d3d3}
.CtxtMenu_MenuLabel {  padding: 1px 2em 3px 1.33em;  font-style:italic}
.CtxtMenu_MenuRule {  border-top: 1px solid #DDDDDD;  margin: 4px 3px;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuDisabled {  color:GrayText}
.CtxtMenu_MenuActive {  background-color: #606872;  color: white;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuDisabled:focus {  background-color: #E8E8E8}
.CtxtMenu_MenuLabel:focus {  background-color: #E8E8E8}
.CtxtMenu_ContextMenu:focus {  outline:none}
.CtxtMenu_ContextMenu .CtxtMenu_MenuItem:focus {  outline:none}
.CtxtMenu_SelectionMenu {  position:relative; float:left;  border-bottom: none; -webkit-box-shadow:none; -webkit-border-radius:0px; }
.CtxtMenu_SelectionItem {  padding-right: 1em;}
.CtxtMenu_Selection {  right: 40%; width:50%; }
.CtxtMenu_SelectionBox {  padding: 0em; max-height:20em; max-width: none;  background-color:#FFFFFF;}
.CtxtMenu_SelectionDivider {  clear: both; border-top: 2px solid #000000;}
.CtxtMenu_Menu .CtxtMenu_MenuClose {  top:-10px; left:-10px}


mjx-container[jax="SVG"] {
  direction: ltr;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"] > svg {
  overflow: visible;
  min-height: 1px;
  min-width: 1px;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"] > svg a {
  fill: blue;
  stroke: blue;
}

mjx-assistive-mml {
  position: absolute !important;
  top: 0px;
  left: 0px;
  clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px);
  padding: 1px 0px 0px 0px !important;
  border: 0px !important;
  display: block !important;
  width: auto !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  -webkit-touch-callout: none;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
  -khtml-user-select: none;
  -moz-user-select: none;
  -ms-user-select: none;
  user-select: none;
}

mjx-assistive-mml[display="block"] {
  width: 100% !important;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"][display="true"] {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  margin: 1em 0;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"][display="true"][width="full"] {
  display: flex;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"][justify="left"] {
  text-align: left;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"][justify="right"] {
  text-align: right;
}

g[data-mml-node="merror"] > g {
  fill: red;
  stroke: red;
}

g[data-mml-node="merror"] > rect[data-background] {
  fill: yellow;
  stroke: none;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > line[data-line], svg[data-table] > g > line[data-line] {
  stroke-width: 70px;
  fill: none;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > rect[data-frame], svg[data-table] > g > rect[data-frame] {
  stroke-width: 70px;
  fill: none;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > .mjx-dashed, svg[data-table] > g > .mjx-dashed {
  stroke-dasharray: 140;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > .mjx-dotted, svg[data-table] > g > .mjx-dotted {
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-dasharray: 0,140;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > g > svg {
  overflow: visible;
}

[jax="SVG"] mjx-tool {
  display: inline-block;
  position: relative;
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
}

[jax="SVG"] mjx-tool > mjx-tip {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
}

mjx-tool > mjx-tip {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: .2em;
  border: 1px solid #888;
  font-size: 70%;
  background-color: #F8F8F8;
  color: black;
  box-shadow: 2px 2px 5px #AAAAAA;
}

g[data-mml-node="maction"][data-toggle] {
  cursor: pointer;
}

mjx-status {
  display: block;
  position: fixed;
  left: 1em;
  bottom: 1em;
  min-width: 25%;
  padding: .2em .4em;
  border: 1px solid #888;
  font-size: 90%;
  background-color: #F8F8F8;
  color: black;
}

foreignObject[data-mjx-xml] {
  font-family: initial;
  line-height: normal;
  overflow: visible;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"] path[data-c], mjx-container[jax="SVG"] use[data-c] {
  stroke-width: 3;
}

</style>

<section class="slide split active" style="display: flex; height: 732px; grid-auto-flow: row; gap: 48px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-flow: row;"><div class="col-text"><div class="kick">the tension · 02</div><h2>Two jobs that pull in <span class="accent">opposite directions</span>.</h2><div class="body"><div class="compare"><div class="box"><div class="t good">recall</div>Related items must sit at <em>higher</em> cosine than unrelated ones, so nearest-neighbor search actually <b>finds</b> them.</div><div class="box"><div class="t bad">resolution / precision</div>Unrelated items must sit at <em>low</em> cosine, so you can <b>rank</b> them and impostors don’t crowd the top.</div></div><p>Push related items together for recall and you compress the very angular room you need to rank them apart. The whole game is grouping at the <b>right granularity</b> — tight enough to retrieve a concept together, loose enough that its members stay distinguishable.</p></div></div><div class="col-fig"><figure class="dg"><svg viewBox="0 0 620 300" width="100%" height="auto" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" role="img" aria-label="Two opposing forces. Recall pulls related items toward the query; resolution keeps items spaced enough to rank. ","<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>

<style>

  /* ---- Console THEME tokens: the full 16-theme colour-scheme set, ported 1:1
       from src/.../variants/T/console4.css --v2-* roles and mapped onto this
       study's token names. The picker sets html[data-theme]; each block fully
       restyles the page. --zicato-accent ← --v2-accent. Default: monokai. ---- */
  html[data-theme="monokai"] {
    --paper:#1e1f1c; --panel:#272822; --panel-2:#23241f;
    --ink:#f8f8f2; --ink-soft:#c9cabf; --ink-faint:#8f908a;

    --good:#a6e22e; --good-soft:#2c361a; --bad:#f92672; --caution:#e6db74;
    --accent:#66d9ef; --accent-2:#66d9ef; --zicato-accent:#66d9ef;
  }
  html[data-theme="solarized-dark"] {
    --paper:#04222B; --panel:#0A2D38; --panel-2:#0A2730;
    --ink:#93A1A1; --ink-soft:#839496; --ink-faint:#5E7079;
    --rule:#0E3540; --rule-soft:#0B2E39;
    --good:#8BB80E; --good-soft:#1C3320; --bad:#E0483C; --caution:#C4920A;
    --accent:#2AA198; --accent-2:#2AA198; --zicato-accent:#2AA198;
  }
  html[data-theme="solarized-light"] {
    --paper:#FDF6E3; --panel:#FBF1D6; --panel-2:#F2E9CE;
    --ink:#586E75; --ink-soft:#657B83; --ink-faint:#93A1A1;
    --rule:#E7DCBE; --rule-soft:#F0E7CC;
    --good:#6B9B0B; --good-soft:#E3ECCB; --bad:#DC322F; --caution:#B58900;
    --accent:#268BD2; --accent-2:#268BD2; --zicato-accent:#268BD2;
  }
  html[data-theme="google-light"] {
    --paper:#FFFFFF; --panel:#F4F4F4; --panel-2:#F8F8F8;
    --ink:#474A4E; --ink-soft:#5F6368; --ink-faint:#9FA1A4;
    --rule:#E2E3E4; --rule-soft:#F1F1F1;
    --good:#34A853; --good-soft:#D2ECD9; --bad:#EA4335; --caution:#C99700;
    --accent:#1B9CB8; --accent-2:#1B9CB8; --zicato-accent:#1B9CB8;
  }
  html[data-theme="google-dark"] {
    --paper:#202124; --panel:#2C2D30; --panel-2:#28292C;
    --ink:#FFFFFF; --ink-soft:#E8EAED; --ink-faint:#989A9D;
    --rule:#444548; --rule-soft:#323336;
    --good:#34A853; --good-soft:#243F2E; --bad:#EA4335; --caution:#FBBC05;
    --accent:#24C1E0; --accent-2:#24C1E0; --zicato-accent:#24C1E0;
  }
  html[data-theme="lunaria-light"] {
    --paper:#EBE4E1; --panel:#E2DCD9; --panel-2:#E6DFDC;
    --ink:#363434; --ink-soft:#484646; --ink-faint:#898584;
    --rule:#CEC8C5; --rule-soft:#DCD6D3;
    --good:#497D46; --good-soft:#C7CDBF; --bad:#783C1F; --caution:#8F750B;
    --accent:#3778A9; --accent-2:#3778A9; --zicato-accent:#3778A9;
  }
  html[data-theme="lunaria-eclipse"] {
    --paper:#323F46; --panel:#3B484F; --panel-2:#38454C;
    --ink:#DFE2ED; --ink-soft:#C9CDD7; --ink-faint:#8D949D;
    --rule:#4D5960; --rule-soft:#404C53;
    --good:#BEDBC1; --good-soft:#516161; --bad:#BA9088; --caution:#F1DFB4;
    --accent:#C8429F; --accent-2:#C8429F; --zicato-accent:#C8429F;
  }
  html[data-theme="belafonte-day"] {
    --paper:#D5CCBA; --panel:#CCC3B2; --panel-2:#D0C6B5;
    --ink:#34292D; --ink-soft:#45373C; --ink-faint:#7F736E;
    --rule:#BBB1A3; --rule-soft:#C8BFAF;
    --good:#6E6A4E; --good-soft:#C3BCA7; --bad:#BE100E; --caution:#B57A1E;
    --accent:#426A79; --accent-2:#426A79; --zicato-accent:#426A79;
  }
  html[data-theme="belafonte-night"] {
    --paper:#20111B; --panel:#271821; --panel-2:#25161F;
    --ink:#D5CCBA; --ink-soft:#968C83; --ink-faint:#675B59;
    --rule:#35272E; --rule-soft:#2B1C24;
    --good:#A6A07A; --good-soft:#362A2B; --bad:#D6403E; --caution:#EAA549;
    --accent:#6F8E97; --accent-2:#6F8E97; --zicato-accent:#6F8E97;
  }
  html[data-theme="paper"] {
    --paper:#F2EEDE; --panel:#E6E2D3; --panel-2:#E8E4D5;
    --ink:#1A1A1A; --ink-soft:#33312B; --ink-faint:#85837A;
    --rule:#C6C3B6; --rule-soft:#DCD9CA;
    --good:#216609; --good-soft:#CCD6B8; --bad:#CC3E28; --caution:#B58900;
    --accent:#1E6FCC; --accent-2:#1E6FCC; --zicato-accent:#1E6FCC;
  }
  html[data-theme="zenburn"] {
    --paper:#3A3A3A; --panel:#424241; --panel-2:#404040;
    --ink:#DCDCCC; --ink-soft:#C5C5B8; --ink-faint:#83837C;
    --rule:#575754; --rule-soft:#494947;
    --good:#8FB28F; --good-soft:#2E3A2E; --bad:#CC9393; --caution:#FFD7A7;
    --accent:#8CD0D3; --accent-2:#8CD0D3; --zicato-accent:#8CD0D3;
  }
  html[data-theme="selenized-black"] {
    --paper:#181818; --panel:#202020; --panel-2:#1E1E1E;
    --ink:#DEDEDE; --ink-soft:#B9B9B9; --ink-faint:#606060;
    --rule:#353535; --rule-soft:#262626;
    --good:#83C746; --good-soft:#243218; --bad:#FF5E56; --caution:#EFC541;
    --accent:#56D8C9; --accent-2:#56D8C9; --zicato-accent:#56D8C9;
  }
  html[data-theme="relaxed"] {
    --paper:#353A44; --panel:#3D424B; --panel-2:#3C404A;
    --ink:#F7F7F7; --ink-soft:#D9D9D9; --ink-faint:#7F8287;
    --rule:#53575F; --rule-soft:#444851;
    --good:#A0AC77; --good-soft:#353D2E; --bad:#BC5653; --caution:#EBC17A;
    --accent:#7EAAC7; --accent-2:#7EAAC7; --zicato-accent:#7EAAC7;
  }
  html[data-theme="espresso"] {
    --paper:#323232; --panel:#3A3A3A; --panel-2:#383838;
    --ink:#FFFFFF; --ink-soft:#D9D9D9; --ink-faint:#8A8A8A;
    --rule:#4C4C4C; --rule-soft:#3E3E3E;
    --good:#A5C261; --good-soft:#353D24; --bad:#D25252; --caution:#FFC66D;
    --accent:#6C99BB; --accent-2:#6C99BB; --zicato-accent:#6C99BB;
  }
  html[data-theme="dracula"] {
    --paper:#282A36; --panel:#343746; --panel-2:#2E303D;
    --ink:#F8F8F2; --ink-soft:#D4D4CF; --ink-faint:#6272A4;
    --rule:#44475A; --rule-soft:#353848;
    --good:#50FA7B; --good-soft:#213A2A; --bad:#FF5555; --caution:#F1FA8C;
    --accent:#BD93F9; --accent-2:#BD93F9; --zicato-accent:#BD93F9;
  }
  html[data-theme="ubuntu"] {
    --paper:#300A24; --panel:#3D1530; --panel-2:#371129;
    --ink:#EEEEEC; --ink-soft:#CBC3C9; --ink-faint:#8A7383;
    --rule:#4B2640; --rule-soft:#3E1A32;
    --good:#8AE234; --good-soft:#2E3320; --bad:#CC0000; --caution:#FCE94F;
    --accent:#34E2E2; --accent-2:#34E2E2; --zicato-accent:#34E2E2;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; }
  html, body { margin: 0; }
  body {
    background: var(--paper);
    color: var(--ink);
    font-family: ui-monospace, "JetBrains Mono", SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    transition: background .18s, color .18s;
    padding: 0 0 80px;
  }

  header {
    position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
    padding: 14px 24px;
    background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--paper) 88%, transparent);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  header h1 { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0; letter-spacing: .02em; }
  header .crumb { font-size: 11px; color: var(--ink-faint); }
  header .crumb a { color: var(--ink-faint); text-decoration: none; }
  header .crumb a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
  header .spacer { flex: 1; }

  main { max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
  section { margin: 34px 0; }
  h2 {
    font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .12em;
    color: var(--ink-faint); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    padding-bottom: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .lede { color: var(--ink-soft); font-size: 13px; margin: 4px 0 20px; max-width: 88ch; }
  .lede code { background: var(--panel); padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; }
  .mono { font-family: inherit; }
  .good { color: var(--good); }
  .bad  { color: var(--bad); }
  .faint{ color: var(--ink-faint); }
  .acc  { color: var(--accent); }

  /* sample fact strip */
  .sample {
    border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--panel);
    padding: 16px 20px; margin: 0 0 12px;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px,1fr)); gap: 14px 24px;
  }
  .sample .kv { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
  .sample .kv .k { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faint); }
  .sample .kv .v { font-size: 15px; color: var(--ink); }
  .sample .kv .v b { font-weight: 700; }

  /* option card */
  .opt {
    border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--panel);
    padding: 0; margin-bottom: 22px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .opt > .opt-head {
    display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); background: var(--panel-2);
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .opt-head .num {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .1em; color: var(--paper);
    background: var(--accent); border-radius: 5px; padding: 3px 9px;
  }
  .opt-head .name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); }
  .opt-head .tech { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ink-faint); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 999px; padding: 2px 8px; }
  .opt-head .why { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-soft); flex: 1 1 100%; margin-top: 2px; }
  .opt-body { padding: 20px; }
  figure { margin: 0; width: 100%; }
  figure svg { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; }
  .fig-narrow { max-width: 620px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .fig-mid { max-width: 820px; }

  .reveal {
    margin-top: 14px; font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--ink-soft);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule); padding: 7px 12px;
    background: var(--panel-2); border-radius: 6px;
  }
  .reveal b { color: var(--ink); }

  /* small inline legend under figures */
  .leg { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--ink-faint); margin-top: 12px; }
  .leg span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
  .leg i { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 2px; display: inline-block; border: 1px solid transparent; }
  .leg i.g { background: var(--good); } .leg i.r { background: var(--bad); }
  .leg i.a { background: var(--accent); } .leg i.f { background: var(--ink-faint); }
  .leg i.dash { background: transparent; border: 1px dashed var(--ink-faint); }
  .leg i.cache { background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--caution); }
  .leg i.c { background: transparent; border: 1px dashed var(--caution); }

  /* ---- isoscore hovercard: a theme-aware, keyboard-reachable explainer popover ---- */
  .hc-fig { position: relative; }
  .hc { position: absolute; z-index: 4; font-family: ui-monospace, "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
        font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent); cursor: help;
        border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--accent); white-space: nowrap; }
  .hc.hc-big { font-size: 19px; font-weight: 700; border-bottom-width: 0; }
  .hc:focus { outline: none; }
  .hc:focus-visible { outline: 1px dashed var(--accent); outline-offset: 3px; }
  .hc .hc-i { display: inline-block; width: 13px; height: 13px; line-height: 12px; text-align: center;
              border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; font-size: 9px; font-style: normal;
              font-weight: 700; vertical-align: 2px; margin-left: 5px; }
  .hc-card { position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 8px); right: 0; width: 366px; max-width: 78vw;
             background: var(--panel); color: var(--ink); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 4px;
             box-shadow: 0 8px 26px rgba(0,0,0,.30); padding: 13px 15px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400;
             white-space: normal; text-align: left; z-index: 30;
             visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-3px); transition: opacity .12s, transform .12s; }
  .hc--up .hc-card { top: auto; bottom: calc(100% + 8px); transform: translateY(3px); }
  .hc:hover .hc-card, .hc:focus-within .hc-card { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .hc-card .hc-h { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; }
  .hc-card .hc-sub { color: var(--ink-faint); font-size: 9.5px; margin: 2px 0 9px; }
  .hc-card p { margin: 0 0 9px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--ink-soft); }
  .hc-card .hc-math { border-top: 1px solid var(--rule-soft); padding-top: 9px; font-size: 10.5px; line-height: 1.85; }
  .hc-card .hc-intro { color: var(--ink-faint); font-size: 9.5px; margin-bottom: 5px; }
  .hc-card .hc-eq { color: var(--ink); }
  .hc-card .hc-eq .hc-note { color: var(--ink-faint); }
  .hc-card .hc-foot { margin-top: 10px; color: var(--accent); font-size: 10px;
                      border-top: 1px solid var(--rule-soft); padding-top: 8px; }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .hc-card { transition: none; } }

  /* ---- "how to read" hovercard: the same explainer popover, anchored in a card header ---- */
  .opt-head .hc-head { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center;
    font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--ink-faint); border-bottom: none; white-space: nowrap; cursor: help; }
  .opt-head .hc-head:hover, .opt-head .hc-head:focus-within { color: var(--accent); }
  .opt-head .hc-head .hc-i { margin-left: 0; width: 14px; height: 14px; line-height: 13px; cursor: help; }
  .opt-head .hc-head:hover .hc-i, .opt-head .hc-head:focus-within .hc-i {
    background: var(--accent); color: var(--paper); }
  .opt-head .hc-head .hc-card { top: calc(100% + 8px); left: 0; right: auto;
    text-transform: none; letter-spacing: normal; font-weight: 400; }
  .hc-card .hc-look { color: var(--ink); }
  .hc-card .hc-bad { color: var(--bad); } .hc-card .hc-good { color: var(--good); }

  svg text { font-family: ui-monospace, "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; }

  footer { max-width: 1180px; margin: 40px auto 0; padding: 18px 24px; color: var(--ink-faint); font-size: 11px; border-top: 1px solid var(--rule); }


  /* ---- the COLOUR SWATCH DROPDOWN (16 Console themes) — mirrors .dt-cd ---- */
  .theme-pick-label { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faint); }
  .dt-cd { position: relative; display: inline-flex; }
  .dt-cd-trigger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px 9px;
    background: var(--panel); color: var(--ink-soft); cursor: pointer;
    font: inherit; font-size: 11px; transition: border-color .15s, color .15s; }
  .dt-cd-trigger:hover { color: var(--ink); border-color: var(--accent); }
  .dt-cd-trigger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }
  .dt-cd-name { color: var(--ink); white-space: nowrap; }
  .dt-cd-caret { color: var(--ink-faint); font-size: 8px; transition: transform .15s; }
  .dt-cd.dt-cd-open .dt-cd-caret { transform: rotate(180deg); }
  .dt-swatch-strip { display: inline-flex; border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--rule); }
  .dt-swatch { display: inline-block; width: 11px; height: 13px; }
  .dt-swatch-strip-sm .dt-swatch { width: 9px; height: 11px; }
  .dt-cd-list { display: none; position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 5px); right: 0; z-index: 60;
    min-width: 200px; max-height: 70vh; overflow-y: auto;
    background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 6px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.28); padding: 4px; }
  .dt-cd.dt-cd-open .dt-cd-list { display: block; }
  .dt-cd-option { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 5px 7px; border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer; color: var(--ink-soft); transition: background .12s, color .12s; }
  .dt-cd-option .dt-cd-name { font-size: 10.5px; }
  .dt-cd-option:hover, .dt-cd-option.dt-cd-active { background: var(--rule-soft); color: var(--ink); }
  .dt-cd-option[aria-selected="true"] .dt-cd-name { color: var(--accent); }

*{box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{height:100%;margin:0}
body{background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink);font-family:ui-monospace,"SF Mono",Menlo,Consolas,monospace;overflow:hidden;transition:background .18s,color .18s;}
.topbar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:44px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;padding:0 24px;z-index:60;}
.topbar .wm{font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.04em;color:var(--ink);font-size:15px;}
.topbar .crumb{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-faint);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;}
.topbar .spacer{flex:1;}
.topbar .count{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.theme-pick-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-faint);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;}
.progress{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;height:3px;background:var(--accent);width:0;z-index:60;transition:width .25s;}
.hint{position:fixed;bottom:11px;right:22px;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--ink-faint);letter-spacing:.06em;z-index:55;}
.stage{position:fixed;transform-origin:0 0;width:1280px;height:800px;background:var(--paper);}
.slide{position:absolute;inset:0;padding:42px 92px 48px;display:none;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;}
.slide.active{display:flex;animation:fin .28s ease both;}
@keyframes fin{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.slide .kick{font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-bottom:12px;}
.slide h2{font-size:42px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.12;margin:0 0 .5em;color:var(--ink);max-width:1090px;}
.slide .accent{color:var(--accent);}
.slide .body{font-size:19px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.6;max-width:1050px;}
.slide .body p{margin:0 0 .7em;} .slide .body b,.slide .body strong{color:var(--ink);}
.slide ul{margin:.3em 0;padding-left:1.1em;} .slide li{margin:.34em 0;}
.slide .lead{font-size:21px;}
figure.dg{margin:8px 0 0;text-align:center;}
figure.dg svg{display:block;max-height:404px;width:auto;max-width:1010px;margin:0 auto;}
figure.dg figcaption{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:9px;max-width:990px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;line-height:1.5;}
.note{border:1px solid var(--rule);background:var(--panel-2);border-radius:8px;padding:11px 15px;margin-top:14px;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55;max-width:1050px;}
.note strong{color:var(--ink);}
.compare{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin:10px 0;max-width:1010px;}
.compare .box{border:1px solid var(--rule);background:var(--panel);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.5;}
.compare .box .t{font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;} .compare .box .t.good{color:var(--good);} .compare .box .t.bad{color:var(--bad);} .compare .box .t.acc{color:var(--accent);}
.eq{font-size:22px;color:var(--ink);margin:.35em 0;}
.num-list{list-style:none;padding:0;counter-reset:n;max-width:1080px;}
.num-list li{counter-increment:n;position:relative;padding-left:2.5em;margin:.5em 0;font-size:17px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.5;}
.num-list li::before{content:counter(n);position:absolute;left:0;top:.05em;font-weight:700;color:var(--paper);background:var(--accent);border-radius:5px;padding:1px 9px;font-size:.82em;}
.num-list li b{color:var(--ink);}
.slide.title{justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;}
.slide .wm{font-size:148px;font-weight:700;line-height:.86;color:var(--ink);letter-spacing:-.02em;}
.slide .tagline{font-size:32px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:.32em;max-width:1010px;line-height:1.2;}
.slide .title-sub{font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:1.25em;max-width:800px;line-height:1.6;}

  /* ---- split layout: text beside a diagram (kills the stacked top-clip) ---- */
  .slide.split{flex-direction:row;align-items:center;gap:48px;padding:38px 74px;}
  .slide.split .col-text{flex:1 1 0;min-width:0;max-width:560px;}
  .slide.split .col-fig{flex:1 1 0;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .slide.split h2{font-size:30px;line-height:1.15;margin:0 0 .5em;}
  .slide.split .body{font-size:16px;line-height:1.55;max-width:none;}
  .slide.split .body p{margin:0 0 .62em;}
  .slide.split .lead{font-size:17px;}
  .slide.split .compare{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:10px;max-width:none;margin:8px 0;}
  .slide.split .compare .box{font-size:13.5px;padding:11px 14px;}
  .slide.split .note{font-size:13px;padding:9px 13px;margin-top:11px;max-width:none;}
  .slide.split .num-list{max-width:none;}
  .slide.split .num-list li{font-size:13.5px;margin:.4em 0;padding-left:2.3em;line-height:1.45;}
  .slide.split .eq{font-size:19px;margin:.2em 0 .55em;}
  .col-fig figure.dg{margin:0;width:100%;}
  .col-fig figure.dg svg{max-height:444px;max-width:100%;margin:0 auto;}
  .col-fig figcaption{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:11px;line-height:1.5;max-width:560px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;text-align:left;}
  /* ---- cv3d vanilla-canvas 3D component (auto-spin, drag-rotate) ---- */
  .cv3d{position:relative;width:100%;max-width:560px;cursor:grab;touch-action:none;margin:0 auto;}
  .cv3d:active{cursor:grabbing;}
  .cv3d-canvas{display:block;width:100%;border:1px solid var(--rule-soft);border-radius:8px;background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--panel) 55%, transparent);}
  .cv3d-tabs{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;justify-content:center;}
  .cv3d-tab{font:inherit;font-size:11px;padding:3px 12px;border:1px solid var(--rule);border-radius:999px;background:var(--panel);color:var(--ink-soft);cursor:pointer;}
  .cv3d-tab.on{background:var(--accent);color:var(--paper);border-color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;}
  .cv3d-tab:hover{color:var(--ink);}
  /* ---- duo layout: a 2D schematic beside its 3D view (same concept, both modalities) ---- */
  .slide.duo{flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;padding:34px 74px;}
  .slide.duo .duo-head{width:100%;max-width:1100px;}
  .slide.duo h2{font-size:29px;line-height:1.14;margin:0 0 .35em;}
  .slide.duo .body{font-size:15px;line-height:1.5;max-width:1100px;}
  .slide.duo .body p{margin:0;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:36px;width:100%;max-width:1100px;align-items:center;margin-top:14px;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs figure.dg{margin:0;width:100%;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs svg{width:100%;height:auto;max-height:344px;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs .cv3d{max-width:100%;}
  .slide.duo .duo-figs figcaption{font-size:11.5px;line-height:1.45;text-align:center;margin:9px auto 0;max-width:none;}
  /* ---- method pipeline: one diagram per algorithm step, left to right ---- */
  .slide.method{flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;padding:38px 48px;}
  .slide.method h2{font-size:34px;line-height:1.12;margin:0 0 .15em;}
  .slide.method .pipeline{display:flex;align-items:stretch;justify-content:center;gap:4px;width:100%;max-width:1190px;margin-top:18px;}
  .slide.method .step{flex:1 1 0;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;border:1px solid var(--rule);border-radius:10px;background:var(--panel);padding:9px 10px 11px;}
  .slide.method .step figure.dg{margin:0;width:100%;}
  .slide.method .step figure.dg svg{display:block;width:100%;height:auto;max-height:none;}
  .slide.method .step .cap{margin-top:7px;}
  .slide.method .step .cap .sb{display:inline-block;font-weight:700;color:var(--paper);background:var(--accent);border-radius:5px;padding:0 7px;font-size:11px;margin-right:6px;}
  .slide.method .step .cap b{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink);}
  .slide.method .step .cap p{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin:5px 0 0;line-height:1.42;}
  .slide.method .parrow{display:flex;align-items:center;color:var(--ink-faint);font-size:17px;flex:0 0 auto;}
  /* ---- title slide as split ---- */
  .slide.title.split{align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .slide.title.split .col-text{max-width:600px;}
  .slide.split .wm{font-size:120px;}
  .slide.split .tagline{font-size:27px;margin-top:.3em;}
  .slide.split .title-sub{font-size:14.5px;margin-top:1.05em;max-width:560px;}
  /* research-preview status tag in the topbar — a quiet two-line mark by the
     wordmark; faint, monospace, a hairline divider, no fill/glow/animation. */
  .topbar .respreview{display:inline-flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-self:center;pointer-events:none;user-select:none;font-size:8.5px;line-height:1.2;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--ink-faint);border-left:1px solid var(--rule);padding-left:9px;}
  .topbar .respreview span{display:block;white-space:nowrap;}

.CtxtMenu_InfoClose {  top:.2em; right:.2em;}
.CtxtMenu_InfoContent {  overflow:auto; text-align:left; font-size:80%;  padding:.4em .6em; border:1px inset; margin:1em 0px;  max-height:20em; max-width:30em; background-color:#EEEEEE;  white-space:normal;}
.CtxtMenu_Info.CtxtMenu_MousePost {outline:none;}
.CtxtMenu_Info {  position:fixed; left:50%; width:auto; text-align:center;  border:3px outset; padding:1em 2em; background-color:#DDDDDD;  color:black;  cursor:default; font-family:message-box; font-size:120%;  font-style:normal; text-indent:0; text-transform:none;  line-height:normal; letter-spacing:normal; word-spacing:normal;  word-wrap:normal; white-space:nowrap; float:none; z-index:201;  border-radius: 15px;                     /* Opera 10.5 and IE9 */  -webkit-border-radius:15px;               /* Safari and Chrome */  -moz-border-radius:15px;                  /* Firefox */  -khtml-border-radius:15px;                /* Konqueror */  box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;         /* Opera 10.5 and IE9 */  -webkit-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080; /* Safari 3 & Chrome */  -moz-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;    /* Forefox 3.5 */  -khtml-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;  /* Konqueror */  filter:progid:DXImageTransform.Microsoft.dropshadow(OffX=2, OffY=2, Color="gray", Positive="true"); /* IE */}

.CtxtMenu_MenuClose {  position:absolute;  cursor:pointer;  display:inline-block;  border:2px solid #AAA;  border-radius:18px;  -webkit-border-radius: 18px;             /* Safari and Chrome */  -moz-border-radius: 18px;                /* Firefox */  -khtml-border-radius: 18px;              /* Konqueror */  font-family: "Courier New", Courier;  font-size:24px;  color:#F0F0F0}

.CtxtMenu_Menu {  position:absolute;  background-color:white;  color:black;  width:auto; padding:5px 0px;  border:1px solid #CCCCCC; margin:0; cursor:default;  font: menu; text-align:left; text-indent:0; text-transform:none;  line-height:normal; letter-spacing:normal; word-spacing:normal;  word-wrap:normal; white-space:nowrap; float:none; z-index:201;  border-radius: 5px;                     /* Opera 10.5 and IE9 */  -webkit-border-radius: 5px;             /* Safari and Chrome */  -moz-border-radius: 5px;                /* Firefox */  -khtml-border-radius: 5px;              /* Konqueror */  box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;         /* Opera 10.5 and IE9 */  -webkit-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080; /* Safari 3 & Chrome */  -moz-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;    /* Forefox 3.5 */  -khtml-box-shadow:0px 10px 20px #808080;  /* Konqueror */}
.CtxtMenu_MenuItem {  padding: 1px 2em;  background:transparent;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuArrow {  position:absolute; right:.5em; padding-top:.25em; color:#666666;  font-family: null; font-size: .75em}
.CtxtMenu_MenuActive .CtxtMenu_MenuArrow {color:white}
.CtxtMenu_MenuArrow.CtxtMenu_RTL {left:.5em; right:auto}
.CtxtMenu_MenuCheck {  position:absolute; left:.7em;  font-family: null}
.CtxtMenu_MenuCheck.CtxtMenu_RTL { right:.7em; left:auto }
.CtxtMenu_MenuRadioCheck {  position:absolute; left: .7em;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuRadioCheck.CtxtMenu_RTL {  right: .7em; left:auto}
.CtxtMenu_MenuInputBox {  padding-left: 1em; right:.5em; color:#666666;  font-family: null;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuInputBox.CtxtMenu_RTL {  left: .1em;}

.CtxtMenu_MenuSlider {  left: .1em;}
.CtxtMenu_SliderValue {  position:absolute; right:.1em; padding-top:.25em; color:#333333;  font-size: .75em}
.CtxtMenu_SliderBar {  outline: none; background: #d3d3d3}
.CtxtMenu_MenuLabel {  padding: 1px 2em 3px 1.33em;  font-style:italic}
.CtxtMenu_MenuRule {  border-top: 1px solid #DDDDDD;  margin: 4px 3px;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuDisabled {  color:GrayText}
.CtxtMenu_MenuActive {  background-color: #606872;  color: white;}
.CtxtMenu_MenuDisabled:focus {  background-color: #E8E8E8}
.CtxtMenu_MenuLabel:focus {  background-color: #E8E8E8}
.CtxtMenu_ContextMenu:focus {  outline:none}
.CtxtMenu_ContextMenu .CtxtMenu_MenuItem:focus {  outline:none}
.CtxtMenu_SelectionMenu {  position:relative; float:left;  border-bottom: none; -webkit-box-shadow:none; -webkit-border-radius:0px; }
.CtxtMenu_SelectionItem {  padding-right: 1em;}
.CtxtMenu_Selection {  right: 40%; width:50%; }
.CtxtMenu_SelectionBox {  padding: 0em; max-height:20em; max-width: none;  background-color:#FFFFFF;}
.CtxtMenu_SelectionDivider {  clear: both; border-top: 2px solid #000000;}
.CtxtMenu_Menu .CtxtMenu_MenuClose {  top:-10px; left:-10px}


mjx-container[jax="SVG"] {
  direction: ltr;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"] > svg {
  overflow: visible;
  min-height: 1px;
  min-width: 1px;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"] > svg a {
  fill: blue;
  stroke: blue;
}

mjx-assistive-mml {
  position: absolute !important;
  top: 0px;
  left: 0px;
  clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px);
  padding: 1px 0px 0px 0px !important;
  border: 0px !important;
  display: block !important;
  width: auto !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  -webkit-touch-callout: none;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
  -khtml-user-select: none;
  -moz-user-select: none;
  -ms-user-select: none;
  user-select: none;
}

mjx-assistive-mml[display="block"] {
  width: 100% !important;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"][display="true"] {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  margin: 1em 0;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"][display="true"][width="full"] {
  display: flex;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"][justify="left"] {
  text-align: left;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"][justify="right"] {
  text-align: right;
}

g[data-mml-node="merror"] > g {
  fill: red;
  stroke: red;
}

g[data-mml-node="merror"] > rect[data-background] {
  fill: yellow;
  stroke: none;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > line[data-line], svg[data-table] > g > line[data-line] {
  stroke-width: 70px;
  fill: none;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > rect[data-frame], svg[data-table] > g > rect[data-frame] {
  stroke-width: 70px;
  fill: none;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > .mjx-dashed, svg[data-table] > g > .mjx-dashed {
  stroke-dasharray: 140;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > .mjx-dotted, svg[data-table] > g > .mjx-dotted {
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-dasharray: 0,140;
}

g[data-mml-node="mtable"] > g > svg {
  overflow: visible;
}

[jax="SVG"] mjx-tool {
  display: inline-block;
  position: relative;
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
}

[jax="SVG"] mjx-tool > mjx-tip {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
}

mjx-tool > mjx-tip {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: .2em;
  border: 1px solid #888;
  font-size: 70%;
  background-color: #F8F8F8;
  color: black;
  box-shadow: 2px 2px 5px #AAAAAA;
}

g[data-mml-node="maction"][data-toggle] {
  cursor: pointer;
}

mjx-status {
  display: block;
  position: fixed;
  left: 1em;
  bottom: 1em;
  min-width: 25%;
  padding: .2em .4em;
  border: 1px solid #888;
  font-size: 90%;
  background-color: #F8F8F8;
  color: black;
}

foreignObject[data-mjx-xml] {
  font-family: initial;
  line-height: normal;
  overflow: visible;
}

mjx-container[jax="SVG"] path[data-c], mjx-container[jax="SVG"] use[data-c] {
  stroke-width: 3;
}

opacity: 1; fill-opacity: 1; stroke-opacity: 1; font-family: ui-monospace, "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 8.5px;">◌</tspan> top-k boundary</text></svg><figcaption>Over-grouped: relatives and impostors both jam the query → precision dies. Balanced: relatives inside the top-k boundary, impostors outside. Under-grouped: relatives scatter past it → recall dies.</figcaption></figure><div class="note"><strong>Isotropy</strong> is how much angular room is in play; <strong>clustering</strong> spends it to buy recall; <strong>resolution</strong> is the room left to keep items apart (precision). “More isotropic” is not the goal — a perfectly uniform space has no grouping at all. Good geometry is <em>structured</em>: clusters spread over the sphere that stay internally roomy.</div></div></section>
</body>
